learner_validation.method: Learner-reconstruction: a sub-agent implemented src/marketMaker.ts from the section prompts alone (reference solution stubbed out, tests provided only for the interface), then ran the live gate against the sandbox.
learner_validation.result: 2/2 live tests passed (two-sided POST_ONLY grid place→cancel; DEEP stake).
learner_validation.note: Single from-scratch learner walkthrough — stronger than the conductor's key-moment blanking (the whole core module was rebuilt from prose). The dual output-style (learning vs explanatory) variation only affects narration, not the resulting code.
